Why do ad boosts change and how do I see my current boost rate?

Last Updated: 16d

Your boost rate changes based on your parcel count - here's how to see your current multiplier and understand how it works.

How to check your boost rate: 

Click the Boost button - You can see your ad boost rate when you click on the Boost button to boost your rent
Before watching ads - Your specific multiplier appears before you confirm watching the ad
Always current - Shows your real-time boost rate based on your current parcel count

Boost rate charts: 

Check official rates - Check the charts below to see ad boost rates for your country based on parcel count
US rates shown - The boost rates below are for the United States
International variations - Other countries may have different rate structures

Here are our other Boost Rates:

       

 

    

If you are playing from outside the United States, check this article.

The charts above assumes the weighted average distribution odds of rarity. A player with higher rare, epic, or legendary parcels may make more than the yearly rate listed. The Event Boost assumes a 32 hour 50X Super Rent Boost event twice a month for a total 64 SRB hours per month. We pre-announce our Super Rent Boost events, so keep a close eye on the game and enroll in text alerts so you don't miss out.
